Offhand/Accessory.name: Glasses
Offhand/Accessory.other_abilities: "+1 when searching rooms, examining objects, or reading"

Offhand/Accessory.description: The +5 vorpal sword of old-school exploration
Offhand/Accessory.name: Ten Foot Pole

Offhand/Accessory.description: Small metal spheres held in a corded leather bag
Offhand/Accessory.name: Bag of Marbles

Offhand/Accessory.description: A sack that can store items
Offhand/Accessory.name: Burlap Sack

Offhand/Accessory.description: Lanterns can be closed to hide the light. They burn one oil flask for each four hours, or 24 turns, and have an effective light radius of 30 feet.
Offhand/Accessory.name: Lantern

Offhand/Accessory.description: 18” long stakes. Valuable when confronting enemies weak to stakes.
Offhand/Accessory.name: Stake

Offhand/Accessory.description: This container, made of hide, will hold 2 pints (1 quart) of fluid.
Offhand/Accessory.name: Waterskin

Weapon.description: A torch burns for 1 hour (6 turns), clearly illuminating a 30' radius. Torches may also be used in combat.
Weapon.name: Torch
Improvised/Unarmed
Weapon.other_abilities: Rolled when no weapon is equipped or player uses an improvised weapon

Weapon.description: A fan made of rare feathers with magical properties
Weapon.name: Feather Fan
